case_title: MADELEINE MULDERRIG VS. CAROLE SLOCUM BARNETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-15-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULDERRIG, MADELEINE AS TO DEFENDANT BARNETT, CAROLE SLOCUM DOES 1 TO 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-23-2017
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COST OF SUIT. (TRANSACTION ID # 100022360)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100019706) FILED BY DEFENDANT BARNETT, CAROLE SLOCUM

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60899379), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULDERRIG, MADELEINE SERVED JUN-22-2017, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JUL-06-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT BARNETT, CAROLE SLOCUM
